allow:
Bash(# 移动文档
mv "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/P2P网络搭建部署指南.md" "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/docs/"
mv "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md" "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/docs/"

# 移动脚本
mv "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/configure-tailscale.ps1" "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/scripts/"

# 移动配置
mv "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/docker-compose-headscale.yml" "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/config/"
mv "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/headscale-config.yaml" "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/config/"
mv "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/config.example.json" "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/config/"

# 移动工具
mv "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/headscale-tool-v2.html" "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/tools/"
mv "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/rest-api-proxy-v2.cjs" "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool/tools/"

echo "文件移动完成"
ls -la "e:/MyCode/python/headscale-management-webtool")
Bash(powershell -Command "Restart-Service tailscale -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host 'Tailscale service restarted'")
Bash(powershell -Command "New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName 'Allow Tailscale Network \(100.64.0.0/28\)' -Direction Inbound -RemoteAddress 100.64.0.0/28 -Action Allow -Profile Any -Enabled True")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName '*Tailscale*' | Get-NetFirewallPortFilter | Select-Object InstanceID, Protocol, LocalPort")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName '*Headscale*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object DisplayName, Enabled, Direction, Action")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -like '*100.64*' -or $_.DisplayName -like '*Headscale*' -or $_.DisplayName -like '*Tailscale*'} | Select-Object DisplayName, Enabled, Direction, Action")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName '*Tailscale*','*Headscale*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table DisplayName, Enabled, Direction, Action -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://ohmyheadscale.duckdns.org/health' -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host '健康检查: OK \(' $r.StatusCode '\)' } catch { Write-Host '错误:' $_.Exception.Message }")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Control URL:'''', d.get\(''''CurrentTailnet'''',{}\).get\(''''ControlURL'''',''''N/A''''\)\); print\(''''BackendState:'''', d.get\(''''BackendState'''',''''N/A''''\)\)")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'SSH-Tunnel-Headscale' | Select-Object TaskName, State, LastRunTime | Format-List")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'SSH-Tunnel-Headscale'; Start-Sleep 5; Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'SSH-Tunnel-Headscale' | Select-Object TaskName, State, LastRunTime | Format-List")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'SSH-Tunnel-Headscale'; Start-Sleep 8; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 8443 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TcpTestSucceeded")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$hostsPath = 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\drivers\\etc\\hosts'
\\$content = Get-Content \\$hostsPath -Raw
\\$newContent = \\$content -replace '47\\.109\\.45\\.147\\s+ohmyheadscale\\.duckdns\\.org', '127.0.0.1 ohmyheadscale.duckdns.org'
Set-Content -Path \\$hostsPath -Value \\$newContent -Force
Write-Host 'hosts 已更新'
Get-Content \\$hostsPath | Select-String 'ohmyheadscale'
")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$task = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'SSH-Tunnel-Headscale'
\\$task.Actions | Select-Object Execute, Arguments | Format-List
")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 443 -State Listen | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(sshpass -p 'iwishit#1' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 2222 duran3000@100.64.0.7 "tailscale netcheck 2>/dev/null | grep -A 5 myderp")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Action Allow -Enabled True | Where { \\$_.Enabled -eq 'True' } | Select-Object -Property DisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetAdapterBinding -ComponentID 'Microsoft Hyper-V Network Adapter' | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription | Format-List")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetAdapter | Where { \\$_.Status -eq 'Up' } | Where-Object { InterfaceAlias, InterfaceDescription, LinkSpeed } | Format-List")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetAdapterBinding -All | Where { \\$_.Enabled -eq 'False' } | Select-Object Name, ComponentID | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetUDPEndpoint | Where-Object LocalPort -in @\(41641\) | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetUDPEndpoint | Where-Object LocalPort -eq 41641 | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName 'Tailscale*' | Get-NetFirewallPortFilter | Where-Object DisplayName -like 'Tailscale' | Select-Object DisplayName, Direction, Action, Enabled")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName 'Tailscale-UDP-In' -Direction Inbound -Protocol UDP -LocalPort 41641 -Action Allow -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Created'")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Protocol UDP -Action Allow | Where Enabled -eq 'True' | Select-Object DisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Action Allow | Where Enabled -eq 'True' | Get-NetFirewallPortFilter | Where Protocol -eq 'UDP' | Select-Object DisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetUDPEndpoint | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort | Format-List | Sort LocalPort")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv6 | Where-Object InterfaceAlias -notlike '*Loopback*' -and IPAddress -notlike 'fe80*' | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv6 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -notlike 'fe80*' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '::1' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName '*Tailscale*' | Where-Object Enabled -eq 'True' | Select-Object DisplayName, Direction, Action")

Bash(powershell -Command "$udp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient; try { $udp.Connect\('47.109.45.147', 3478\); $bytes=[System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes\('test'\); $udp.Send\($bytes,$bytes.Length\); Write-Host 'UDP packet sent to 47.109.45.147:3478 - check server tcpdump' } catch { Write-Host $_.Exception.Message } finally { $udp.Close\(\) }" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Protocol UDP | Where-Object Enabled -eq 'True' | Select-Object DisplayName, LocalPort, Action | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound | Where-Object { \\$_.Enabled -eq 'True' -and \\$_.Action -eq 'Block' } | Select-Object DisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallPortFilter | Where-Object { \\$_.Protocol -eq 'UDP' } | Get-NetFirewallRule | Where-Object { \\$_.Enabled -eq 'True' -and \\$_.Direction -eq 'Inbound' } | Select-Object DisplayName, Action | Format-Table")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { \\$_.ProcessName -match '360|huorong|tencent|kaspersky|avast|avg|mcafee|eset|symantec|火绒|毒霸|瑞星' } | Select-Object ProcessName")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv6 | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress -notlike 'fe80*' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '::1*'} | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv6 | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{v[HostName]}: {v.get\(CurAddr,-\)} | Relay: {v.get\(Relay,direct\)} | Endpoints: {v.get\(Endpoints,[]\)}''''\) for k,v in d.get\(''''Peer'''',{}\).items\(\)]")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$json = tailscale status --json | ConvertFrom-Json
\\$dragon = \\$json.Peer.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { \\$_.Value.HostName -eq 'dragon' } | Select-Object -First 1
\\$dragon.Value | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5
")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name ssh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter \\"Name='ssh.exe'\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$hosts = Get-Content 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\drivers\\etc\\hosts'
\\$newHosts = \\$hosts | Where-Object { \\$_ -notmatch 'ohmyheadscale.duckdns.org' }
\\$newHosts | Set-Content 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\drivers\\etc\\hosts'
Write-Host 'Hosts file updated'
ipconfig /flushdns
nslookup ohmyheadscale.duckdns.org
")
Bash(powershell -Command "Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'SSH-Tunnel-Headscale'; Start-Sleep 8; Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'SSH-Tunnel-Headscale' | Select-Object TaskName, State")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{k}: {v}''''\) for k,v in d.get\(''''Peer'''',{}\).get\(''''redminote13pro'''',{}\).get\(''''Addrs'''',[]\)[:5]]")
